briefdescription.para: Stepped DES orchestrator that pauses at every dispatch decision point, accepts an action (from a fixed rule or RL agent), then advances to the next.

detaileddescription.para: This is the Gymnasium step() pattern. The bridge owns the DES, the visual layer, and the reward computation. It exposes the same interface whether the caller is a fixed-rule validator (Phase 1), an ML-Agents policy (Phase 3), or a Python training loop over a socket (Phase 3 alt).

listitem.para: Training mode (default): No visuals. Step returns synchronously. Maximum throughput for PPO data collection.
Visual debug mode: Visuals are driven between decision points via a coroutine. Step still returns immediately, but visual playback catches up asynchronously. Toggle with enableVisuals.
